title: SubhanAllah
benefits: A tree is planted in Paradise for the reciter. Heavy in weight on the scales of good deeds.

title: Alhamdulillah
benefits: Fills the scale of good deeds with blessings. Expands gratitude and brings peace.

title: Allahu Akbar
benefits: Declaring Allah's supremacy. Part of the Tasbih of Fatima (r.a.) before sleeping.

title: Astaghfirullah
benefits: Removes sins, opens gates of mercy, increases sustenance, and brings relief from anxiety.

title: La ilaha illallah
translation: There is no deity worthy of worship except Allah
benefits: The best statement of remembrance. Keeps faith renewed and protects the heart.

title: Durood Sharif (Salawat)
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ وَسَلِّمْ عَلَى نَبِيِّنَا مُحَمَّدٍ
transliteration: Allahumma salli wa sallim 'ala Nabiyyina Muhammad
translation: O Allah, send blessings and peace upon our Prophet Muhammad
benefits: Allah sends 10 blessings upon you for every 1 Durood. Elevates status and clears worries.

title: Tawheed Decal (Morning)
arabic: لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ، لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ، وَهُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
transliteration: La ilaha illallahu wahdahu la sharika lahu, lahul-mulku wa lahul-hamdu, wa Huwa 'ala kulli shai'in Qadir
translation: None has the right to be worshipped except Allah, alone, without partner. To Him belongs all sovereignty and praise, and He is over all things Omnipotent.
benefits: Equivalent to freeing ten slaves, 100 good deeds recorded, 100 sins erased, and protection from Shaytan all day.

title: Glorification (Evening)
translation: Glory be to Allah and praise is due to Him
benefits: Sins are forgiven even if they are like the foam of the sea. No one will bring anything better on Judgement Day except one who says the same or more.

title: Friday Salawat
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى سَيِّدِنَا مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِهِ
transliteration: Allahumma salli 'ala Sayyidina Muhammadin wa alihi
translation: O Allah, send blessings upon our master Muhammad and his family
benefits: Prophet Muhammad (PBUH) receives Friday blessings directly. Brings closeness to him on the Day of Resurrection.
